channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Lightweight AI Assistant - Mon Jul 13 22:43:20 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.description:

item.title: EasyMybatisLog - Fri Jul 17 10:52:54 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: HOCON Support - Fri Jul 17 10:01:18 UTC 2026
